description: Dane Giraud is a screenwriter, filmmaker, comedian, and free speech advocate, best known as the creator of the satirical mockumentary series Find Me a Māori Bride. He is a council member of the Free Speech Union and hosts their podcast Free to Speak. This wide-ranging conversation covers fashion, colonialism, his filmmaking career, a terrifying pitch to Fijian dictator Frank Bainimarama, comedy, cancel culture, and the state of free speech.
